task:
Implement the CodeRabbit Coding Plan for issue #2205: [Templates Step 2] Refactor PPTX generator to accept TemplateConfig ## Instructions 1. `cd ~/2025slideheroes-sophie` 2. `git fetch upstream && git checkout upstream/dev && git checkout -b sophie/issue-2205` 3. Read the full issue: `gh issue view 2205 --repo slideheroes/2025slideheroes` 4. Implement according to the Coding Plan below 5. Run `pnpm format:fix && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm typecheck` before committing 6. Commit with: `git commit -m "feat: [Templates Step 2] Refactor PPTX generator to accept TemplateConfig (#2205)"` 7. Push: `git push origin sophie/issue-2205` 8. Open PR via GraphQL (same-org fork — `gh pr create` doesn't work): ```bash gh api graphql -f query=' mutation CreatePR { createPullRequest(input: { repositoryId: "R_kgDON3X_Ow" baseRefName: "dev" headRefName: "sophie/issue-2205" headRepositoryId: "R_kgDORH2m4g" title: "feat: [Templates Step 2] Refactor PPTX generator to accept TemplateConfig" body: "Closes #2205\n\nImplemented per CodeRabbit Coding Plan." }) { pullRequest { url number } } }' ``` ## CodeRabbit Coding Plan ## Coding Plan ### Summary - Introduce TemplateConfig as a separate Zod schema file to establish a clean type foundation that can grow with the template system - Extract all current hardcoded values into a DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_CONFIG constant that serves as both the backward-compatibility guarantee and documentation of baseline styling - Refactor the generator using a config resolution pattern where the optional parameter merges with defaults, minimizing changes to existing method signatures while enabling full customization - Adapt the schema to match PptxGenJS capabilities (boolean roundedCorners instead of numeric borderRadius) while deferring complex features like footer rendering that require additional infrastructure
Design Choices
Design Choice 1: Chart borderRadius Implementation **Options Considered:** 1. Use `roundedCorners: boolean` which PptxGenJS supports via `chartArea: { roundedCorners: true }` 2. Keep `borderRadius: number` in schema but ignore values, treating any non-zero as "enabled" 3. Remove borderRadius from the schema entirely **Chosen Option:** 1 **Rationale:** Use `roundedCorners: boolean` - this accurately represents the library's capability and avoids misleading the API consumer about available control.
Design Choice 2: Footer Implementation Approach **Options Considered:** 1. Implement footers via `slide.addText()` with calculated bottom positioning 2. Define footer in slide masters only (requires master slide refactoring) 3. Keep footerStyle in schema but defer implementation to a future ticket **Chosen Option:** 3 **Rationale:** Keep footerStyle in schema but defer full implementation - this ticket focuses on generator refactoring infrastructure; footer rendering can be added incrementally without breaking the schema contract.
Design Choice 3: Schema Location **Options Considered:** 1. Add to existing `presentation-artifacts.ts` alongside other presentation schemas 2. Create new `template-config.ts` schema file in the same schemas directory **Chosen Option:** 2 **Rationale:** Create dedicated `template-config.ts` - the TemplateConfig schema is substantial (~40+ lines) and represents a distinct domain concept that will likely grow; separation improves maintainability.
💡 User Tips Regenerate the plan with different choices with `@coderabbitai `. ## Implementation Steps ### Phase 1: Define TemplateConfig Schema and Default Template This phase establishes the type system foundation by creating the TemplateConfig schema and extracting all current hardcoded values into a default template that preserves existing behavior.
Task 1: Create TemplateConfig Zod Schema Define the complete TemplateConfig schema using Zod to match existing codebase patterns, with the adjusted `roundedCorners` field for charts. - Create `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/_lib/schemas/template-config.ts` with Zod schema definitions - Define nested schemas: `TemplateColorsSchema`, `TemplateTypographySchema`, `TemplateLayoutSchema`, `TemplateChartsSchema` - Main `TemplateConfigSchema` composing all sub-schemas with `charts` as optional - Adjust charts schema to use `roundedCorners: z.boolean()` instead of `borderRadius: number` - Export both the Zod schema and inferred TypeScript type - Update `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/_lib/schemas/index.ts` to re-export the new schema
Task 2: Extract Default Template Configuration Create a default template file containing all current hardcoded values, serving as the baseline for backward compatibility. - Create `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/storyboard/_lib/services/powerpoint/default-template.ts` - Extract typography: Arial font family, sizes (title: 40/24, subheadline: 18, body: 16, caption: 12) - Extract colors: derive sensible defaults for primary/secondary/accent from current chart colors, error red for text emphasis - Extract layout: current slide dimensions (10" x 7.5" standard), standard margins (0.5" based on current positions) - Extract chart settings: current color sequence `['4472C4', 'ED7D31', 'FFC000', '5B9BD5', '70AD47']`, gridLines from current defaults - Export as `DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_CONFIG` constant with full type annotation - Add JSDoc comments documenting that these values preserve pre-refactor behavior
🤖 Prompt for AI agents ``` Establish the type system foundation by creating the TemplateConfig schema and default template that preserves existing behavior. **Create TemplateConfig Zod Schema:** - Create `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/_lib/schemas/template-config.ts` with Zod schema definitions - Define nested schemas: `TemplateColorsSchema`, `TemplateTypographySchema`, `TemplateLayoutSchema`, `TemplateChartsSchema` - Main `TemplateConfigSchema` should compose all sub-schemas with `charts` as optional - Use `roundedCorners: z.boolean()` in the charts schema (not `borderRadius: number`) - Export both the Zod schema and inferred TypeScript type - Update `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/_lib/schemas/index.ts` to re-export the new schema **Extract Default Template Configuration:** - Create `apps/web/app/home/(user)/ai/storyboard/_lib/services/powerpoint/default-template.ts` - Extract typography values: Arial font family, sizes (title: 40/24, subheadline: 18, body: 16, caption: 12) - Extract colors: derive sensible defaults for primary/secondary/accent from current chart colors, error red for text emphasis - Extract layout: current slide dimensions (10" x 7.5" standard), standard margins (0.5" based on current positions) - Extract chart settings: current color sequence `['4472C4', 'ED7D31', 'FFC000', '5B9BD5', '70AD47']`, gridLines fr
